ads.author: Justin Hayworth
ads.title: Arcade Marquee Lightbox
ads.description: Choice of 3 different custom built Arcade Marquee lightboxes: Punchout Donkey Kong Jr Rampage World Tour $125 each These are wooden boxes built out or 1x4 lumber. The marquee is a translite graphic with plexiglass in front. They have been painted a color to compliment the graphic.. There is a choice of a white only led light strip or you can get a multicolor led strip with a remote. The multicolor is not as bright as the white only (soft white) strip and does not output a pure white color (more of a blueish color). See the last pic for the differences in the light strips. Local pickup only. I don't want to deal with shipping. Cash only.

ads.title: Scooby-Doo Night of 100 Frights
ads.description: This listing is for Scooby-Doo Night of 100 Frights on Playstation 2 Complete in Box (CIB) and includes: Game Disc – Clean and fully tested, works perfectly. Original Case – In good condition with minor shelf wear. Manual & Inserts – Included and in good overall condition. - NOTE - Please review photos carefully for specific item condition prior to messaging. This is a pre-owned, vintage item and is not a new copy. Normal signs of age and use may be present, including surface scratches, label wear, or cosmetic imperfections from years of play, but rest assured—every game is fully tested and working before it’s listed. All games are fully tested and confirmed working prior to listing. If you'd like, I can send a video of the game booting up and playing correctly so you can verify it's working as expected!! Please review all photos for the exact condition of the item. Feel free to message me with any questions before purchasing. I also have more games on my Marketplace page that I am selling, Check it out and send me a message me if you are interested in anything, Thank you for your time!
